title: Midnight Ukrainian Chickpea Dumplings
description: Silky, floral dumplings made from chickpea flour, perfect for midnight cravings.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together chickpea flour, salt, pepper, dill, garlic powder, paprika, and lemon juice until a crumbly dough forms.
Gradually add water and olive oil, stirring until the mixture comes together into a pliable dough.
Knead the dough for 2 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Divide the dough into 12 equal portions and roll each into a small ball.
Flatten each ball into a thin disc about 3 inches in diameter.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil over high heat.
Carefully drop the flattened discs into the boiling water, cooking for 3 to 4 minutes until they rise to the surface.
Remove the dumplings with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel to drain.
Serve the dumplings warm, optionally drizzled with a light drizzle of olive oil or a sprinkle of fresh dill.
